changeSet.author: zafar
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO branches (seller_id, name, address, city, delivery_fee, min_order_amount, working_hours, is_active) SELECT s.id, CONCAT(s.name, ' — Главный'), 'Адрес не указан', 'Ташкент', 15000.00, 30000.00, '09:00–22:00', TRUE FROM sellers s WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM branches b WHERE b.seller_id = s.id );
